name: IRC_AF_PAGE_BLOCKS_VL
query: SELECT B.PAGE_BLOCK_ID PAGE_BLOCK_ID, B.PAGE_ID PAGE_ID, B.PAGE_BLOCK_SEQ_NUM PAGE_BLOCK_SEQ_NUM, TL.PAGE_BLOCK_TITLE PAGE_BLOCK_TITLE, TL.PAGE_BLOCK_INSTRUCTIONS PAGE_BLOCK_INSTRUCTIONS, B.BLOCK_ID BLOCK_ID, B.HIDE_IN_MOBILE_FLAG HIDE_IN_MOBILE_FLAG, B.PAGE_BLOCK_REQUIRED_FLAG PAGE_BLOCK_REQUIRED_FLAG, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM IRC_AF_PAGE_BLOCKS_B B, IRC_AF_PAGE_BLOCKS_TL TL WHERE B.PAGE_BLOCK_ID = TL.PAGE_BLOCK_ID AND TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
